<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="Po_pyLHe2Sg_qVV1Nuvt" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-439" dy="-251" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" value="从 Docker 镜像到 K8s Deployment —— 概念层级全景" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="200" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dockerfile_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECEFF1;strokeColor=#90A4AE;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Dockerfile" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="180" x="360" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_df_img" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="450" y="90" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="125" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="build_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;align=right;" value="docker build (构建)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="100" x="465" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="image_box" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;startSize=25;" value="Image (镜像)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="340" x="280" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer1" parent="image_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#43A047;fontSize=10;" value="Layer 4: app.jar (你的业务代码)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="300" x="20" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer2" parent="image_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#A5D6A7;strokeColor=#43A047;fontSize=10;" value="Layer 3: JDK 17 (运行环境)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="300" x="20" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer3" parent="image_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#81C784;strokeColor=#43A047;fontSize=10;" value="Layer 2: 依赖库 (apt-get install ...)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="300" x="20" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer4" parent="image_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#66BB6A;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=10;" value="Layer 1: ubuntu:22.04 (Base Image)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="300" x="20" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_img_ctr" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="450" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="run_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;align=right;" value="docker run (实例化)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="105" x="470" y="302" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="container_box" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;startSize=22;" value="Container (容器) = 镜像的运行实例" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="340" x="280" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctr_writable" parent="container_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE0B2;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontSize=10;" value="Writable Layer (可写层: 日志/临时文件/状态)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="300" x="20" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctr_img_ref" parent="container_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#FF8F00;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="只读层: 引用 Image 的 4 个只读层 (UnionFS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="300" x="20" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_ctr_pod" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="450" y="435" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="480" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wrap_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;align=right;" value="K8s 接管: Pod 是容器的 "家"" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="160" x="470" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod_box" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;startSize=22;" value="Pod (最小调度单元)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="340" x="280" y="485" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod_ctr1" parent="pod_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=10;" value="Container A (主容器: nginx)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="140" x="20" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod_ctr2" parent="pod_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#90CAF9;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=10;" value="Container B (Sidecar: 日志收集)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="140" x="180" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod_shared" parent="pod_box" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#3F51B5;fontSize=9;" value="共享: 同一个 IP + 同一个 localhost 网络 + 共享存储卷" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="300" x="20" y="68" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_pod_rs" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="450" y="605" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="650" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rs_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;align=right;" value="ReplicaSet 管理 Pod 副本数" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="145" x="475" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rs_box" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;startSize=22;" value="ReplicaSet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="340" x="280" y="655" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rs_pod1" parent="rs_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CE93D8;strokeColor=#8E24AA;fontSize=10;" value="Pod-0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="85" x="20" y="32" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rs_pod2" parent="rs_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CE93D8;strokeColor=#8E24AA;fontSize=10;" value="Pod-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="85" x="125" y="32" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rs_pod3" parent="rs_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CE93D8;strokeColor=#8E24AA;fontSize=10;" value="Pod-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="85" x="230" y="32" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_rs_deploy" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="450" y="740" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="785" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deploy_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;align=right;" value="Deployment 提供滚动更新/回滚" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="155" x="475" y="745" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deploy_box" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE4EC;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;startSize=22;" value="Deployment (无状态应用控制器)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="340" x="280" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deploy_detail" parent="deploy_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8BBD0;strokeColor=#D81B60;fontSize=9;" value="滚动升级: 新 RS 逐步创建 Pod, 旧 RS 逐步删除 Pod
回滚: kubectl rollout undo 恢复上一个版本
扩缩容: kubectl scale 改 replicas 数量" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="300" x="20" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_annotation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EEEEEE;strokeColor=#616161;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" value="Docker 范畴
(单机)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="100" x="30" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_bracket" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="130" y="150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="130" y="435" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_annotation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EEEEEE;strokeColor=#616161;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" value="K8s 范畴
(集群)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="100" x="30" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_bracket" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#616161;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="130" y="500" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="130" y="830" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="takeaway" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECEFF1;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="记住: 写 Dockerfile → build 出 Image → run 成 Container → K8s 把 Container 放进 Pod → Pod 被 ReplicaSet 管 → ReplicaSet 被 Deployment 管" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="680" x="120" y="895" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
滚动升级: 新 RS 逐步创建 Pod, 旧 RS 逐步删除 Pod
回滚: kubectl rollout undo 恢复上一个版本
扩缩容: kubectl scale 改 replicas 数量

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(238, 238, 238), rgb(32, 32, 32)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(97, 97, 97), rgb(154, 154, 154));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(238, 238, 238), rgb(32, 32, 32)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(97, 97, 97), rgb(154, 154, 154));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 98px; height: 1px; padding-top: 540px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 239, 241), rgb(31, 33, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(84, 110, 122), rgb(129, 151, 162));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 910px; margin-left: 101px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 记住: 写 Dockerfile → build 出 Image → run 成 Container → K8s 把 Container 放进 Pod → Pod 被 ReplicaSet 管 → ReplicaSet 被 Deployment 管
